mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", r.visit_state AS "visitState", ( fe.register_id IS NOT NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_patient_profile fp0 WHERE fp0.register_id = r.id ) ) AS "enrolled", COALESCE( fe.priority_level, (SELECT fp1.priority_level FROM follow_up_patient_profile fp1 WHERE fp1.register_id = r.id LIMIT 1) ) AS "enrollmentPriority", ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inspection_request ir WHERE ir.register_id = r.id AND ir.inspection_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ir.inspection_result) <> '' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM check_request cr WHERE cr.register_id = r.id AND cr.check_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.check_result) <> '' ) ) AS "hasLabResults" FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' WHERE ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_history_event he WHERE he.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medical_record mr INNER JOIN medical_record_disease mrd ON mrd.medical_record_id = mr.id WHERE mr.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medical_record mr WHERE mr.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inspection_request ir WHERE ir.register_id = r.id AND ir.inspection_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ir.inspection_result) <> '' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM check_request cr WHERE cr.register_id = r.id AND cr.check_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.check_result) <> '' ) )
AND r.visit_state = #{visitState} AND r.id NOT BETWEEN 1001 AND 1005
AND r.visit_state IN (3, 5, 6) AND r.id NOT BETWEEN 1001 AND 1005
AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_enrollment fe_d WHERE fe_d.register_id = r.id AND fe_d.status = 'active' AND fe_d.managing_department_id = #{departmentId} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_patient_profile fp_d WHERE fp_d.register_id = r.id AND fp_d.department_id = #{departmentId} ) )
ORDER BY r.visit_date DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", r.visit_state AS "visitState", mr.diagnosis AS "diagnosis", mr.diagnosis AS "preliminaryDiagnosis" FROM register r LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON mr.register_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.card_number AS "cardNumber", r.birthdate AS "birthdate", r.age AS "age", r.age_type AS "ageType", r.home_address AS "homeAddress", r.visit_date AS "visitDate", r.noon AS "noon", r.is_book AS "isBook", r.regist_method AS "registMethod", r.regist_money AS "registMoney", r.visit_state AS "visitState", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", e.realname AS "physicianName", rl.regist_name AS "registLevelName", sc.settle_name AS "settleCategoryName", mr.diagnosis AS "diagnosis", mr.diagnosis AS "preliminaryDiagnosis", mr.readme AS "chiefComplaint", mr.present AS "presentIllness", mr.history AS "pastHistory", mr.allergy AS "allergy", mr.physique AS "physique", mr.proposal AS "treatmentProposal", mr.careful AS "precautions", COALESCE( r.card_number, ( SELECT ph.id_card FROM patient ph WHERE ph.real_name = r.real_name AND ph.birthdate = r.birthdate AND ph.delmark = 1 LIMIT 1 ) ) AS "idCard", COALESCE( r.home_address, ( SELECT ph.home_address FROM patient ph WHERE ph.real_name = r.real_name AND ph.birthdate = r.birthdate AND ph.delmark = 1 LIMIT 1 ) ) AS "contactAddress", COALESCE( ( SELECT ph.phone FROM patient ph WHERE ph.real_name = r.real_name AND ph.birthdate = r.birthdate AND ph.delmark = 1 LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT u.phone FROM users u WHERE u.real_name = r.real_name AND u.status = 1 LIMIT 1 ) ) AS "phone", ( SELECT u.email FROM users u WHERE u.real_name = r.real_name AND u.status = 1 LIMIT 1 ) AS "email", ( SELECT ac.allergy_summary FROM ai_consultation_record ac WHERE ac.register_id = r.id ORDER BY ac.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS "consultationAllergy" FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = r.deptment_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON rl.id = r.regist_level_id LEFT JOIN settle_category sc ON sc.id = r.settle_category_id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON mr.register_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id AS "diseaseId", d.disease_name AS "diseaseName", d.disease_category AS "diseaseCategory", d.diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd" FROM medical_record mr INNER JOIN medical_record_disease mrd ON mrd.medical_record_id = mr.id INNER JOIN disease d ON d.id = mrd.disease_id WHERE mr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY d.disease_name

SELECT e.id AS "id", e.register_id AS "registerId", e.payload->>'symptomRelief' AS "symptomRelief", e.summary AS "patientFeedback", e.occurred_at AS "followUpTime" FROM follow_up_history_event e WHERE e.register_id = #{registerId} AND e.event_type = 'patient_feedback' ORDER BY e.occurred_at DESC NULLS LAST, e.id DESC

SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.week_start_date AS "weekStartDate", s.status AS "status" FROM follow_up_interview_schedule s WHERE s.register_id = #{registerId} AND s.week_start_date = #{weekStartDate} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_interview_schedule ( register_id, case_number, patient_name, week_start_date, status, trigger_reason, trigger_metric_key, created_by, patient_notified ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{caseNumber}, #{patientName}, #{weekStartDate}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'scheduled'), #{triggerReason}, #{triggerMetricKey}, #{createdBy}, 0 )
